LanguageData.MapThreatActive.label: active map threat
LanguageData.ToxicFalloutActive.label: toxic fallout
LanguageData.SolarFlareActive.label: solar flare
LanguageData.AnomalyGrayFleshEvidence.label: imitator infection evidence
LanguageData.AnomalyGrayFleshEvidence.instruction: write this as paranoia and fear that some unknown thing may be infecting people and imitating them; keep it grounded in what the pawn could suspect, make ordinary faces and voices feel untrustworthy, and never explain hidden game mechanics or identify a host
LanguageData.MetalhorrorEmergence.label: metalhorror emergence
LanguageData.MetalhorrorInfection.label: hidden imitator infection
LanguageData.ColdSnapActive.label: cold snap
LanguageData.HeatWaveActive.label: heat wave
LanguageData.VolcanicWinterActive.label: volcanic winter
LanguageData.BloodRainActive.label: blood rain
LanguageData.DeathPallActive.label: death pall
LanguageData.UnnaturalDarknessActive.label: unnatural darkness
LanguageData.PitGatePresence.label: pit gate
LanguageData.PitGatePresence.instruction: write the pawn seeing the pit gate torn open in the colony's ground: a hole that goes down farther than it should, heat and sound from below, and things that climb out of it; keep it grounded in what can be seen and heard, and never explain what is at the bottom
LanguageData.FleshmassHeartPresence.label: fleshmass heart
LanguageData.FleshmassHeartPresence.instruction: write the pawn realizing a heart of living flesh has erupted nearby and is growing toward the colony: the sound of it, the ground changing, the need to cut it back; write revulsion and urgency without explaining its biology or inventing a resolved fight
LanguageData.ObeliskPresence.label: obelisk on the map
LanguageData.HarbingerTreePresence.label: harbinger trees
LanguageData.NociospherePresence.label: nociosphere
LanguageData.UnnaturalCorpsePresence.label: unnatural corpse
LanguageData.ThrumboVisit.label: thrumbo on the map
LanguageData.AlphabeaversActive.label: alphabeavers
LanguageData.CropBlightActive.label: crop blight
LanguageData.AmbrosiaSprouted.label: ambrosia grove
